title: OpenAI publishes frontend design guidance for GPT-5.4
friendlyTitle: OpenAI shares tips for better AI-made websites
summary: OpenAI’s developer blog says GPT-5.4 is better at generating visually polished and functional frontends, especially when given clear design constraints, references, and verification tools such as Playwright. The post includes practical prompting rules to avoid generic layouts and improve brand-specific UI work.
friendlySummary: OpenAI says GPT-5.4 is stronger at making web frontends. The post explains how to guide it with design rules, references, and testing tools.
whyItMatters: As AI-generated interfaces become more common, the advantage shifts from simply asking for a page to directing style, function, testing, and iteration. The guidance is useful for builders trying to turn AI frontend output into something shippable rather than merely impressive in a screenshot.
friendlyWhyItMatters: If you use AI to build websites or apps, better prompts and testing can help you get results that look polished and actually work.
